meta.title: It's TRUE: A-10s CAN BEAT F-22's in air combat. Here's why.
meta.description:
Pictures of an A-10 sporting an F-22 marking on its fuselage have been circulating the internet for a few years now... but how could this low-and-slow ground pounder of an aircraft take down the reigning king of the skies?

Let's talk about it. 

Learn more about the A-10's air-to-air chops:
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/airpower/believe-it-or-not-the-a-10-can-hold-its-own-in-a-dogfight/

https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-most-prolific-pilot-in-the-vietnam-war-probably-didnt-actually-exist/
https://www.airforcemag.com/article/0893warthog/#:~:text=During%20the%20forty%2Dday%20conflict,air%2Dto%2Dair%20engagements.
https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1991-02-08-mn-937-story.html
